dns_proxy_enabled.description: Enables DNS proxy functionality for the resource

dns_servers.description: List of custom DNS server IPs to configure (IPv4 format required)

firewall_policy_id.description: ID of the associated firewall policy (must be a valid resource ID)

ip_configuration.description: Details for IP configuration including private/public IPs and subnet IDs

management_ip_configuration.description: Management IP settings with required public IP and subnet IDs

name.description: User-defined name for the resource (must be unique within the scope)

private_ip_ranges.description: List of IP ranges in CIDR notation for private networks

sku_name.description: Specifies SKU name (e.g., Standard, Premium; case-sensitive)

sku_tier.description: Defines SKU tier (e.g., Free, Standard, Premium; case-sensitive)

tags.description: Key-value pairs for resource metadata and categorization

threat_intel_mode.description: Specifies threat intelligence mode (e.g., Alert, Deny, Off)

timeouts.description: Timeout settings for resource operations (create, read, update, delete)

virtual_hub.description: Configuration for a virtual hub including IP details and hub ID

zones.description: List of availability zones for deploying the resource

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
